name: PlantHire.ai Compliance Agent
description: AI compliance for plant and equipment hire — CPCS card checks, maintenance scheduling, and hire contract compliance.

skills.name: Operator Competence Checks
skills.description: Verify CPCS, NPORS, and HSE cards for plant operators

skills.name: Maintenance Scheduling
skills.description: Track LOLER, PUWER, and routine servicing

skills.name: Hire Contract Compliance
skills.description: Validate hire notes, rates, and conditions against CSOAI governance
